_comment: Pa11y configuration for the ICCC accessibility check workflow.
chromeLaunchConfig sets --no-sandbox for GitHub Actions runner.
The ignore list is intentionally empty at setup build time.
Any pre-existing AAA failures found during Carol's test pass
are documented in docs/accessibility.md under 'Pre-existing AAA
failures, deferred to the accessibility phase' and tracked in
